program.name: Program
program.description: A top-level line of coordinated work inside a target repo.

milestone.name: Milestone
milestone.description: A bounded delivery checkpoint within a stage.

work_item.name: Work Item
work_item.description: A concrete unit of agent-addressable work within a milestone.

work_items.title: Public self-dogfood participation gate
Public source participation lifecycle gate

closure.summary: Closed after publishing agent-onboard@0.0.14 with public source participation lifecycle support.

work_items.title: Public handoff and closure evidence gate

work_items.title: Public source closure test fixture alignment gate

work_items.title: Public package publish verification gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding a public release verification harness in agent-onboard@0.0.17 that validates package metadata, projected npm pack allowlist, public artifact messaging, and post-publish verification commands without mutating the npm registry.
known_non_pass: npm publish itself is still an operator action outside the CLI; the CLI verifies and reports the release contract only.

work_items.title: Public release contract absorption gate

closure.summary: Closed by absorbing the public release contract into agent-onboard@0.0.18: added a normalized release contract command, source-ledger-aware release checks, explicit source-vs-package context reporting, and retained the compact public npm pack allowlist.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public package contract fixture gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding a public package contract fixture matrix in agent-onboard@0.0.19: release --fixture exposes the regression matrix and source tests now exercise installed-package pass, stale package version, npm pack allowlist drift, missing bin entrypoint, and public artifact messaging failure cases.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public installed package parity smoke gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding an installed package parity smoke surface in agent-onboard@0.0.20: release --parity-smoke verifies the source candidate release check, projected npm package file set, source-context exclusion from the package, bin entrypoint inclusion, and package/runtime version parity without executing package-manager, registry, Git, or build commands.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding surface planning gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding a read-only public target onboarding surface plan in agent-onboard@0.0.21: target onboarding --plan declares the target repository onboarding sequence, canonical files, explicit write boundaries, and next candidate gate before expanding write-capable target behavior.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding dry-run fixture gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding a public target onboarding dry-run fixture matrix in agent-onboard@0.0.22: target onboarding --fixture declares no-write regression fixtures for the target onboarding plan, target bootstrap dry-run, target instance takeover dry-run, AGENTS.md preview, conflict detection, and force-preview behavior.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding explicit write boundary gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public target onboarding explicit write boundary in agent-onboard@0.0.23: target onboarding --write now performs the aggregate canonical onboarding write only when explicitly requested, refuses divergent files unless --force is provided, and writes no dependencies, Git state, build outputs, registry state, or non-canonical files.
checks_run: node cli/agent-onboard.js target onboarding --write in temporary target repo
node cli/agent-onboard.js target onboarding --write --force in temporary target repo
node cli/agent-onboard.js target bootstrap --dry-run in temporary target repo
node cli/agent-onboard.js target-instance takeover --dry-run in temporary target repo
node cli/agent-onboard.js agents --preview in temporary target repo
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding installed package smoke gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public target onboarding installed package smoke in agent-onboard@0.0.24: the release command exercises target onboarding plan, fixture, and explicit write against a temporary target from the current package context, while the source test installs the packed tarball into a clean target and verifies the installed package context.
checks_run: npm pack --json in temporary pack directory
npm install local agent-onboard-0.0.24.tgz --no-save --ignore-scripts in temporary target repo
installed package smoke: node node_modules/agent-onboard/cli/agent-onboard.js target onboarding --write
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry and npx verification remain operator handoff checks after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding post-publish verification handoff gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public target onboarding post-publish verification handoff in agent-onboard@0.0.25: release --post-publish-handoff emits the deterministic npm view and version-pinned npx verification commands for the operator after publish, including target onboarding plan, fixture, smoke, and release check coverage without mutating package, registry, Git, dependency, build, deploy, publish, push, or target repository state.
checks_run: npm pack --json in temporary pack directory
npm install local agent-onboard-0.0.25.tgz --no-save --ignore-scripts in temporary target repo
installed package smoke: node node_modules/agent-onboard/cli/agent-onboard.js target onboarding --write
checks_not_run: npm view agent-onboard@0.0.25 name version license bin repository
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry and npx verification remain operator handoff checks until this source candidate is actually published.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding published package acceptance gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public target onboarding published package acceptance gate in agent-onboard@0.0.26: release --published-acceptance composes release check, post-publish handoff validation, parity smoke, target onboarding smoke, plan, and fixture checks so the version-pinned published package can be accepted after registry verification without mutating package root, target repository state, Git, registry, dependencies, build, deploy, publish, or push state.
checks_run: npm pack --json in temporary pack directory
npm install local agent-onboard-0.0.26.tgz --no-save --ignore-scripts in temporary target repo
installed package smoke: node node_modules/agent-onboard/cli/agent-onboard.js target onboarding --write
checks_not_run: npm view agent-onboard@0.0.26 name version license bin repository
known_non_pass: Actual post-publish registry acceptance remains an operator check until this source candidate is published and verified from npm with version-pinned npx commands.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding real target repo trial gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public target onboarding real target repo trial gate in agent-onboard@0.0.27. The gate adds a read-only target onboarding trial command for explicit target paths plus a release-level realistic target fixture trial that projects canonical onboarding files without writing target state.
known_non_pass: No external real target repository was provided in this handoff; the source candidate includes a read-only --target path trial command and a realistic temporary target fixture trial.

work_items.title: Public target onboarding owner handoff evidence gate

closure.summary: Closed by carrying the owner handoff from the 0.0.27 real target trial into agent-onboard@0.0.28. The next admitted public line is architecture absorption; any real target write remains owner-authorized only.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public architecture map gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public architecture map gate in agent-onboard@0.0.28. The gate declares the six-domain architecture kernel, exposes architecture --map and architecture --check, and includes architecture validation in release --check while preserving the compact npm package allowlist.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public command router boundary gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public command router boundary gate in agent-onboard@0.0.29. The gate introduces a table-driven top-level dispatch boundary, architecture --router inspection, command-router validation inside architecture --check and release --check, and keeps the npm package allowlist compact.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public domain service facade gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public domain service facade gate in agent-onboard@0.0.30. The gate introduces architecture --facades, declares one service facade per public architecture domain, routes top-level commands through DOMAIN_SERVICE_FACADES, validates facade ownership inside architecture --check and release --check, and preserves the compact npm package allowlist.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

work_items.title: Public authority first-read index gate

closure.summary: Closed by adding the public authority first-read index gate in agent-onboard@0.0.31. The gate introduces authority --first-read and authority --check, materializes llms.txt and .agent-onboard/authority-path.json as source authority files, extends target onboarding canonical files with the first-read authority surface, validates authority ordering inside architecture --check and release --check, and preserves the compact npm package allowlist.
known_non_pass: Post-publish registry verification remains an operator handoff after publishing this source candidate.

closure.summary: Closed by preparing agent-onboard@0.0.33 with a public package surface preservation gate. work_items.title: Public source domain module partition planning gate

closure.summary: Closed by preparing agent-onboard@0.0.35 with a public source domain module partition planning gate. The gate adds architecture --partition-plan and architecture --partition-check, admits .agent-onboard/source-partition-plan.json as a source-only planning artifact, maps future src/domains/* modules to the six canonical public domains and service facades, and preserves the compact four-file npm package surface without moving source files.

work_items.title: Public source extraction golden output freeze gate
